title: Client Services Coordinator
description: 3M, the diversified technology company, seeks a Client Services Coordinator to support our strategic accounts and customer relationships. Working fully remote, you'll manage client communications, coordinate projects, and ensure exceptional service. Join a company known for innovation and customer commitment.
responsibilities: Serve as primary point of contact for assigned client accounts
Coordinate client projects and manage deliverables
Process orders and manage account logistics
Respond to client inquiries and resolve issues
Maintain detailed client records and account documentation
Prepare reports and facilitate client communications

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Business, Communications, or related field
skills: Customer service and client relationship management

benefits: Health, dental, vision, and life insurance
